name: Rin Okumura
description: Rin Okumura (奥村 燐 Okumura Rin) is the main protagonist of the Blue Exorcist series. He is the son of Satan and the elder, fraternal twin brother of Yukio Okumura. Studying as an Exwire at True Cross Academy, Rin desires to become a Knight Meister and defeat his biological father satan.
creator: StarKonata
